channel.title: The Economic Edge: Master Your Wealth

item.title: Climate change is forcing Vanuatu to confront an unthinkable future
item.description:
"Explore the devastating impact of climate change on Vanuatu, a Pacific island nation facing an uncertain future. Listen to powerful stories and expert insights on our podcast." (160 characters, including spaces)
Alternatively, for a slightly longer description: "Climate change is redefining Vanuatu's future. Tune in to our podcast for in-depth discussions with experts, policymakers, and locals on the frontlines of this crisis, as they navigate rising sea levels, extreme weather, and a fight for survival." (approximately 300 characters)
